creator: freebsd-bugs@joe.mulloy.me
text:
I downloaded FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20160518-r300097-disc1.iso for testing in a bhyve VM. I attempted to configure my IPv4 network settings manually and once I'm done with the settings it brings me back to "Please select a network interface to configure". I've also tried this in VMware Fusion and get the same result.

Steps to reproduce:

Please select a network interface to configure:
OK

Configure IPv4: YES
DHCP: NO
IP Address: 10.2.1.200
Subnetmask: 255.255.255.0
Default Router: 10.2.1.1

Installer returns you to interface selection.
